<!--
Thanks for the PR! Title this PR using Conventional Commits (see CONTRIBUTING.md):

  <type>(<scope>): <subject>

e.g.  feat(mdedit): add idle auto-shutdown
      fix(mdedit): remove stale state file on SIGTERM
      ci: add lint and test workflow
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Change type

<!-- Check one — should match the PR title prefix. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `build` / `ci` / `chore` — tooling / maintenance

## Verification

<!-- How did you verify this? e.g. `uvx ruff check .`, `uvx mypy`, `uv run --with pytest ...`. -->

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] tests pass (`python -m pytest skills/.../test_*.py`)
